name: gtm-ontology-builder
description: Build evidence-backed company context and agent-ready GTM ontologies from business materials, market research, CRM evidence, and live-system discovery.

interface.shortDescription: Build company context and agent-ready GTM ontologies.
interface.longDescription: Inventory products, groups, ICPs, personas, positioning, market and Closed Won evidence into validated company context, then model CRM objects, pipelines, automations, agent actions, governance policies, and KPIs as a linked GTM ontology.
defaultPrompt: Build company context from my materials, market research, and won CRM opportunities.
Inventory and normalize my products, product groups, ICPs, personas, positioning, and GTM motions.
Build a GTM ontology for my CRM stack.
Map my sales process, CRM fields, automations, and agent actions.
